# Transcrição: 9. Money Equals Close

- **Fonte:** 9. Money Equals Close
- **Duração:** 00:16

## [00:00 - 00:16]

Money equal close. If the money was the same, which product would you rather own? Or who would you rather do business with? Me or them? You got to get them to pick. Why them or why me? Really, why else? Why else until there's no answer?
